itinerary.title: Vietnam Ladies Escape
itinerary.overview:
05 Nights / 06 Days Premium Vietnam Ladies Retreat SERIAL CODE: VN-005 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-VNM-LAD-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Vietnam CATEGORY: Premium Ladies Escape Tour Package DURATION: 05 Nights / 06 Days Hanoi & Coastal Sanctuary

TOUR OVERVIEW
Rejuvenate, explore, and bond with our TRAGUIN curated Vietnam Ladies Escape. Designed for style and relaxation, this journey combines the chic boutiques of Hanoi, private culinary masterclasses, and ultimate coastal rejuvenation, ensuring unforgettable memories in the most elegant corners of Vietnam. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Vietnam package (VN-005 / TRG-VNM-LAD-2026): Hanoi Shopping • Boutique Stays • Culinary Masterclasses • Coastal Relaxation with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN HANOI & STYLE WELCOME

days.title: ARRIVAL IN HANOI & STYLE WELCOME
days.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Private chauffeur transfer to a handpicked boutique hotel. Evening welcome dinner in a stylish, garden-setting restaurant.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: CHIC SHOPPING & HANOI CHARM
days.description: A guided tour of Hanoi’s hidden shopping gems and chic fashion boutiques. Perfect for a day of style and discovery, creating unforgettable memories. TRAGUIN Ladies Retreats •
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: CULINARY MASTERCLASS
days.description: Join an exclusive experience culinary masterclass, learning to prepare authentic Vietnamese dishes in a beautiful, private garden setting.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: COASTAL REJUVENATION
days.description: Transfer to a pristine coastal sanctuary. Spend the day indulging in personalized spa therapies and relaxation by the private beach—a premium retreat.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: COASTAL LEISURE & FAREWELL GALA
days.description: Final day of coastal leisure and boutique shopping, followed by a grand farewell gala dinner under the stars, celebrating the perfect ladies' escape.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private chauffeur transfer to the airport, completing your premium Vietnam retreat.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
